purpose: Daily vehicle case intake template for the ProCore mobile/Discord publishing workflow.

publishIntent.notes: Website may be drafted immediately. External channels require explicit approval.

caseContext.privateLocation: Do not publish exact address unless explicitly allowed.
caseContext.scene: 車主鑰匙全丟，車輛停放於地下停車場
caseContext.serviceType: 汽車鑰匙全丟到場處理
caseContext.result: 完成鑰匙匹配，遙控、感應與啟動功能確認正常

seo.primaryKeyword: 台中 BMW 鑰匙全丟
seo.tone: 清楚、可信、結果導向，不公開可複製的技術細節

privateNotes: Internal notes may help the AI understand the case, but must not be published if they reveal customer identity, exact location, or repeatable technical methods.
